# CoreAI-Opt

> CoreAI-Opt is an Apple library for model compression, quantization, and related optimizations.


2026, Apple, Inc. All rights reserved

- [w4_per_block](api/generated/coreai_opt.quantization.ModuleQuantizerConfig.presets.w4_per_block.html.md): int4 weight-only quantization, per-block symmetric, block_size defaults to 32.
- [w8](api/generated/coreai_opt.quantization.ModuleQuantizerConfig.presets.w8.html.md): int8 weight-only quantization, per-channel symmetric.
